# chat_sl supervised fine-tuning recipe: one short step, then resume.
# model_name=Qwen/Qwen3-8B is mapped to the cached 0.6B MLX checkpoint by the
# server; renderer_name=qwen3 avoids any renderer lookup. Flags are verified
# against recipes/chat_sl/train.py CLIConfig.

python -m tinker_cookbook.recipes.chat_sl.train model_name=Qwen/Qwen3-8B renderer_name=qwen3 dataset=$WORK/data.jsonl log_path=$WORK/run max_steps=1 num_epochs=1 batch_size=2 lora_rank=4 save_every=1 eval_every=1000 behavior_if_log_dir_exists=delete
exists $WORK/run/metrics.jsonl
grep train_mean_nll $WORK/run/metrics.jsonl
exists $WORK/run/checkpoints.jsonl
grep state_path $WORK/run/checkpoints.jsonl

# Resume from the checkpoint just written; the recipe logs the resume line.
python -m tinker_cookbook.recipes.chat_sl.train model_name=Qwen/Qwen3-8B renderer_name=qwen3 dataset=$WORK/data.jsonl log_path=$WORK/run max_steps=1 num_epochs=1 batch_size=2 lora_rank=4 save_every=1 eval_every=1000 behavior_if_log_dir_exists=resume
stderr 'Resumed training from'

-- data.jsonl --
{"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "What is 2 plus 2?"}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "2 plus 2 is 4."}]}
{"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "Name a primary color."}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "Red is a primary color."}]}
{"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "What is the capital of France?"}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "The capital of France is Paris."}]}
{"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "Say hello."}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "Hello!"}]}
